历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 32656 → 35597 → 35719 → 50458 → 52128, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 16400 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 52128 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial Physics Category plans were 194, 195, 187, 187, and 187 respectively, with a 2026 plan of 195, a slight expansion of about 4.3% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 89th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, fluctuating between 84 and 92 in recent years, overall stable; reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 83rd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, and short video exposure at a medium level; no record of admission gaps; Transportation Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, Transportation, and Traffic Engineering, providing some support for related engineering major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, matching the university's engineering characteristics; Civil and Architectural majors have shifted from obvious discouragement to differentiated观望, while Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is in a state of differentiated观望; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 436, with little fluctuation in recent years; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 211 university, with a recruitment proportion in Guangdong of about 3–5% (about 114 out of 3581 total places in 2025), not a provincial university, so regional preference has a neutral impact on Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, the increase of about 3.6% in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the slight decline in university ranking, competition is expected to intensify further based on the 2025 baseline of 52128; the predicted minimum ranking is about 53766, with a range of 53266–54266.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 53000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors.
